pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which dynamically generates the light curve CSV using a Python script with mathematical transit modeling and Gaussian noise.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Kepler-8b light curve data created by setup_task.sh. Based on the injected transit model and Gaussian noise, simulating the exact ONLYOFFICE spreadsheet formulas yields a true Transit Depth of ~0.01286, a Radius Ratio of ~0.1134, and a Planet Radius of ~1.633. All these calculated values fall perfectly within the allowed verification ranges specified in the metadata (e.g., radius [1.30, 1.65]). The expected output path /home/ga/Documents/Spreadsheets/kepler8b_analysis.xlsx matches the export scripts.
